findings.evidence: PR lines 52, 58, 64 prove `(f + g).hom = ...`, `(-f).hom = ...`, `(f - g).hom = ...`; `mathlib/Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Preadditive/AdditiveFunctor.lean:57`, `:79`, `:83` define `Functor.map_add/map_neg/map_sub`, and `:182` gives `fullSubcategoryInclusion_additive`; `mathlib/Mathlib/CategoryTheory/ObjectProperty/FullSubcategory.lean:54` has `ι_map : P.ι.map f = f.hom`.
findings.fix: Delete these lemmas and use `Functor.map_add`, `Functor.map_neg`, and `Functor.map_sub` for `(ComoduleCat.isFG (R := R) (C := C)).ι`, with `ObjectProperty.ι_map` simplifying the map to `.hom`.
findings.issue: `hom_add_hom`, `hom_neg_hom`, and `hom_sub_hom` duplicate the generic additive full-subcategory inclusion API.

findings.evidence: PR lines 69-115 restate underlying-linear-map and pointwise behavior; existing hits are `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/ComoduleCat.lean:198`, `:204`, `:230`, `:236` and `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule/Preadditive.lean:161`, `:168`, `:183`, `:190`, with `mathlib/Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Limits/Shapes/ZeroMorphisms.lean:819` providing `ObjectProperty.zero_hom` for the zero projection.
findings.fix: Remove the finite wrappers or replace them with proofs/call sites using the generic projection lemmas and `ComoduleCat.toLinearMap_zero`, `ComoduleCat.toLinearMap_add`, `ComoduleCat.toLinearMap_neg`, `ComoduleCat.toLinearMap_sub`, `ComoduleCat.zero_apply`, `ComoduleCat.add_apply`, `ComoduleCat.neg_apply`, and `ComoduleCat.sub_apply`.
findings.issue: The zero/add/neg/sub `toLinearMap` and pointwise lemmas are only finite-specialized restatements of the full-subcategory projection together with existing ambient `ComoduleCat` lemmas.

summary: The PR adds finite-comodule wrappers for additive full-subcategory projections that Mathlib already supplies generically. These declarations should be removed in favor of the existing full-subcategory inclusion/additive-functor API plus the ambient `ComoduleCat` simp lemmas.
